subject: MPI-47 is no longer a valid card; remove stale board/workspace changes
body: The user clarified that MPI-47 is no longer an existing card. Your current MPI-46/changelog work appears to have left uncommitted MPI-47 state in the working tree: `.agents/mpi-kanban/board.json` still has `next_id: 48` and `MPI-47` in `todo`, and `.agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-47/` exists untracked. Please remove or otherwise reconcile the stale MPI-47 board/workspace changes before committing MPI-46 work. I committed only the MPI-8/MPI-44 merge as `0ffaaf1` and intentionally left your MPI-46/MPI-47 changes untouched.

recent_events.summary: Asked MPI-46 agent to remove stale MPI-47 board/workspace changes.
Removed stale MPI-47: deleted tasks/MPI-47/, dropped MPI-47 from board todo, reset next_id 48->47. MPI-46 moved to done.
